sectors.67: Sector 67 is one of Mohali's most established and secure residential zones. Flanked by commercial showrooms and premium schools, it is characterized by low-rise development and legacy cooperative housing societies. The sector is highly sought after for its mature infrastructure, clean parks, and peaceful living environment, making resale apartments here highly liquid.
sectors.68: Sector 68 is a centrally located residential sector in Mohali, offering an optimal balance of accessibility and peaceful living. It borders the administrative hub of Mohali and is connected directly to Chandigarh via the sector division roads. The presence of several government employee cooperative societies makes it a reliable, high-trust neighborhood for families.
sectors.70: Sector 70 is a premium, mature residential sector in Mohali. Known for its wide sector roads, abundant green parks, and immediate proximity to Chandigarh, it commands some of the highest residential land rates in the city. It features a mix of luxury independent houses, cooperative group housing societies, and premium commercial markets.
sectors.78: Sector 78 lies in the central residential zone of Mohali, adjacent to the PCA Cricket Stadium and Sector 68. The sector benefits from excellent sports infrastructure, wide roads, and proximity to major markets. It serves as an attractive destination for families looking for ready-to-move-in apartments with direct connectivity to Chandigarh and Airport Road.
sectors.82: Sector 82 is Mohali's primary industrial and commercial hub, containing the JLPL Industrial Park. It is a highly active commercial zone with offices, warehouses, and manufacturing units. The sector benefits from direct access to Airport Road, making it a critical asset for commercial property owners and investors seeking stable rental income.
sectors.83: Sector 83 is a mixed-use industrial and commercial sector in Mohali, situated adjacent to Sector 82. It forms a key part of the industrial expansion corridor on Airport Road, hosting tech offices and logistics hubs. Proximity to the airport and transport nodes supports its high occupancy rates for commercial spaces.
sectors.88: Sector 88 is one of Mohali's largest and most rapidly growing residential sectors. Conceived as a low-density residential hub, it features wide internal roads, expansive parks, and modern civic infrastructure. It hosts several landmark premium residential projects, catering to buyers who prioritize lifestyle amenities and modern security.
sectors.91: Sector 91 is a mature residential sector in Mohali's western corridor. It offers a mix of private developer projects, independent villas, and cooperative societies. Flanked by green belts and localized commercial centers, it is highly popular among retired defense personnel, NRI families, and first-time premium home buyers.
sectors.112: Sector 112 is an upcoming residential and commercial sector located along the Landran-Banur Road in Mohali. Positioned as a gateway to the outer highway networks, it offers highly competitive pricing compared to the central sectors. It is popular among buyers seeking large carpet areas and modern amenities at accessible price brackets.
sectors.116: Sector 116 is a rapidly growing residential sector in Mohali's outer ring. Located along the main Landran-Kharar corridor, it features a mix of residential plots, low-rise floors, and gated communities. The sector is highly favored by first-time home buyers and investors looking for early-stage capital appreciation.
sectors.117: Sector 117 is part of the TDI City master development in Mohali. Strategically located on the Kharar-Landran Road, it enjoys excellent connectivity to the NH-21 highway. The sector is a self-contained micro-township featuring residential towers, independent floors, shopping malls, and commercial spaces at accessible prices.
sectors.121: Sector 121 is located on the immediate border of Mohali and Chandigarh, adjacent to the NH-21 highway. It functions as a strategic entrance to the Tricity. The sector is dominated by low-density premium group housing projects, offering Chandigarh proximity combined with Mohali's modern infrastructure.
sectors.126: Sector 126 is an established residential and commercial hub in Mohali's northern corridor, bordering Kharar. Home to mega-townships like Gillco Valley, it features a highly active rental market due to nearby educational institutions and commercial hubs. It offers excellent connectivity to NH-21.
sectors.66A: Sector 66A is part of Mohali's IT City zone, adjacent to the 1,900-acre JLPL Industrial Park. The sector benefits from direct access to NH-205, proximity to Chandigarh International Airport (~12 min), and is flanked by the Phase 8 IT cluster — home to Quark City, DLF IT Park, and Infosys campuses. Residential demand here is structurally supported by IT sector employment, making rental yields in 66A consistently stronger than most other Mohali sectors.
sectors.66B: Sector 66B is a premium extension of IT City, Mohali. Positioned along the Airport Road, it represents one of the most high-potential growth corridors in the Tricity. It hosts luxury high-rise group housing societies and enjoys direct proximity to the international airport and upcoming commercial complexes. Real estate demand is driven by corporate HNIs and NRI investors.
sectors.82A: Sector 82A is a prestigious micro-market within IT City, Mohali. Strategically located along the Airport Road, this sector is designed to accommodate premium commercial projects and high-density luxury residential towers. With its proximity to Chandigarh International Airport and major IT clusters, it is a prime target for high-yield commercial investments.
sectors.83A: Sector 83A is an upscale commercial and residential micro-pocket near IT City on the Airport Road. It is home to landmark commercial structures and Mohali's tallest residential towers. The sector benefits from massive infrastructure investment and serves as a high-growth zone for luxury residential developments.
sectors.Aerocity: Aerocity is Mohali's flagship commercial and residential development along the international airport corridor. Spanning several blocks, it features wide avenues, premium commercial showrooms, and upscale residential plots. It is considered one of the most prestigious addresses in Mohali with high capital growth potential.

ats-infrastructure-limited.buyerProfile: Premium to luxury buyers seeking spacious layouts
ats-infrastructure-limited.advisoryVerdict: ATS (ATS Infrastructure Limited) is renowned for low-density, high-quality residential campuses across North India. Their Mohali flagship, ATS Casa Espana in Sector 121, represents a premium entrance address with Spanish-influenced architecture and massive green expanses. Our advisory recommends ATS for buyers who prioritize structural longevity, layout size, and easy daily Chandigarh commutes. Caveat: Maintenance disputes and delayed handovers in some towers require buyer diligence; ensure current compliance checks with our desk before signing.

background.c1: Established in 1998 by Getamber Anand, ATS has delivered over 30 million square feet of residential space. Known for their signature Mediterranean facades, generous green spaces, and in-house facility management, they operate as a premium developer with a national presence.
background.c2: In Mohali, ATS has focused on a single massive project: ATS Casa Espana in Sector 121. Positioned on the border of Chandigarh and Mohali, it features 121-acre master planning with only two apartments per lobby floor. This low-density layout provides a distinct level of privacy and green space that newer high-density projects cannot match, establishing it as a primary luxury landmark.

editorialNotes.ats-casa-espana-sector-121-mohali: Spanish-themed luxury residences featuring low-density layout and massive green areas. Offers the best Chandigarh-Mohali border connectivity and premium construction.

rightFor: Families seeking low-density apartments with maximum privacy (only 2 flats per floor)
Commuters who need quick, traffic-free access to Chandigarh
Buyers prioritizing massive carpet areas and high ceilings
lookElsewhere: Budget buyers with a ticket size below ₹1.5 crore
Investors looking for quick resale gains or high rental-to-price ratios

faqs.q: Is ATS RERA verified in Mohali?
faqs.a: Yes. ATS Casa Espana is registered under Punjab RERA with registration number PBRERA-SAS80-PR0084.

faqs.q: What is the starting price for ATS flats in Mohali?
faqs.a: ATS Casa Espana units start from ₹1.65 crore for 3BHK configurations, with 4BHK and penthouses commanding up to ₹3.20 crore.

faqs.q: In which sectors does ATS have projects in Mohali?
faqs.a: ATS operates in Sector 121, Mohali, situated directly on the Chandigarh border off the NH-21 highway.

faqs.q: Is ATS good for investment in Mohali?
faqs.a: Yes, for long-term capital preservation. The low-density nature of the project keeps demand high on the secondary market.

faqs.q: How do I book an ATS flat through Realty Holding and Management Consultants?
faqs.a: You can request a verified unit inventory sheet through the Inquiry form on this page or call our desk directly for developer negotiations.

jubilee-group.buyerProfile: First-time buyers, mid-segment families, and commercial investors
jubilee-group.advisoryVerdict: Jubilee Group is Mohali's most consistent entry point for first-time apartment buyers and commercial space investors. With active projects spanning Sector 91, 112, and 116, Jubilee targets a functional, value-driven buyer profile. Our advisory team rates their delivery record as highly consistent. Caveat: Floor plan configurations vary significantly between projects, and pricing on outer-road developments is highly sensitive to infrastructure progress. Verify the specific block status before booking.

background.c1: Founded in 2013, Jubilee Group has established itself as a reliable regional developer in the Tricity. They have focused on delivering functional residential apartments and highly visible retail showrooms along Mohali's major sector division corridors.
background.c2: Jubilee's footprint is spread strategically across emerging and established sectors. In Sector 91, their Jubilee Vallum project offers premium mid-segment living, while Jubilee Twinto in Sector 112 caters to compact, entry-level requirements. They are also known for commercial landmarks like Jubilee Square on Airport Road, demonstrating a balanced portfolio.

editorialNotes.jubilee-twinto-sector-112-mohali: Compact, highly affordable 1BHK apartments ideal for working professionals or young couples near outer Chandigarh connectivity.
editorialNotes.jubilee-vallum-sector-91-mohali: Premium mid-segment 3 & 4 BHK apartments featuring modern layouts, high-quality finishes, and mature sector facilities.
editorialNotes.jubilee-city-gardens: A mixed-use gated township in Sector 116 offering residential plots and independent floors for custom build-outs.

Investors seeking stable rental yields from commercial showrooms
Buyers with a budget range between ₹45L and ₹1.2Cr
lookElsewhere: Buyers seeking ultra-luxury, low-density penthouses or golf-facing layouts
Buyers requiring immediate possession in uncompleted phases

faqs.a: Yes. All Jubilee Group projects, including Jubilee Vallum and Jubilee Twinto, are fully registered with Punjab RERA.

faqs.q: What is the starting price for Jubilee flats in Mohali?
faqs.a: Jubilee flats start from ₹45 lakh for compact 1BHK units at Jubilee Twinto, scaling up to ₹1.85 crore for premium 4BHK units.

tdi.buyerProfile: Value-conscious buyers and high-yield commercial rental seekers
tdi.advisoryVerdict: TDI (TDI Infratech Ltd.) is one of the oldest master-developers in the outer Mohali-Kharar belt, responsible for the multi-acre TDI City. Their primary listing, Wellington Heights in Sector 117, offers highly competitive pricing for spacious layouts. Our advisory desk recommends TDI for budget buyers seeking ready-to-use infrastructure. Caveat: Maintenance quality and road infrastructure in TDI City have faced legacy challenges; verify block-specific civic statuses with us.

background.c1: Founded in 1989, TDI Infratech is a Delhi-based developer with massive integrated township footprints in Haryana and Punjab. They pioneered early-stage large-scale colonization in Mohali's outer corridors.
background.c2: TDI's footprint is centered in TDI City, spanning Sector 117, 118, and 119. Wellington Heights is their flagship high-rise development here, providing affordable residential options adjacent to shopping malls and NH-21 connectivity, creating a highly self-contained ecosystem.

editorialNotes.wellington-heights: Spacious, highly budget-friendly residential towers in Sector 117. Enjoy direct access to malls and retail clusters, making it ideal for nuclear families.

Investors looking for immediate rental yield from local professionals
Buyers wanting ready-to-move-in options with mature retail nearby
lookElsewhere: Buyers seeking premium luxury finishes and high-end club facilities
Buyers sensitive to localized municipality service delays

Our desk recommends Homeland for buyers seeking elite social status, premium security, and immediate liquidity. background.c2: Homeland's presence is anchored at prestigious crossroads. Homeland Heights in Sector 70 commands high resale values, while Homeland Regalia represents a massive new-generation luxury tower development on the Airport Road corridor, serving the ultra-luxury demographic.

background.c2: Noble's footprint includes Noble Magnollia in Sector 88 and the major Noble Callista project in Sector 66B, IT City. This positions them at the center of Mohali's modern expansion corridors, catering to the growing corporate workforce.

gmada-govt-of-punjab.buyerProfile: Government employees, high-trust buyers, and long-term land investors
gmada-govt-of-punjab.advisoryVerdict: GMADA (Greater Mohali Area Development Authority) is the state planning body of Mohali, providing the highest legal security. Their residential project, Purab Premium Apartments in Sector 88, offers large-format apartments with unmatched legal safety. Our desk recommends GMADA for conservative buyers who prioritize clean titles and government-backed infrastructure. Caveat: Maintenance is managed by authority-appointed agencies and lacks private-luxury standards; expect basic utility management over luxury services.

background.c1: Created in 2006 under the Punjab Regional and Town Planning and Development Act, GMADA is the official government authority responsible for master planning, sector layout designs, and infrastructure acquisition in Mohali.
background.c2: GMADA's residential footprint is highlighted by Purab Premium Apartments in Sector 88. Beyond this, GMADA is the primary source of freehold residential plots across Mohali sectors, making their allotments the ultimate benchmark for property safety and legal ownership.

editorialNotes.purab-premium-apartments-sector-88-mohal: Government-constructed apartments in Sector 88 offering massive layouts and maximum legal safety. Features extensive outdoor sports complexes.

Buyers seeking large carpet areas and solid brick-and-mortar construction
Investors looking for stable resale value backed by government authority
lookElsewhere: Buyers looking for high-end luxury lifestyle amenities and private club services
Buyers who require immediate, highly responsive private maintenance desks

faqs.q: How do I purchase a GMADA property?

jlpl.buyerProfile: Mid-premium to ultra-luxury buyers, industrial and commercial investors
jlpl.advisoryVerdict: JLPL (Janta Land Promoters Ltd.) is the closest thing Mohali has to a legacy developer. Operational since 1995 and transformed into a master developer by 2003, their footprint in Sector 66A is the benchmark against which all other Mohali developments are measured. The Falcon View towers — at ₹4.09 crore onwards — represent the top end of the city's luxury apartment market. Our desk recommends JLPL for buyers who prioritize location permanence and brand credibility over newer developer offers. Caveat: Falcon View's premium pricing reflects its status; buyers seeking value-per-sqft will find better returns elsewhere in our directory.

background.c1: Founded in 1995 by Kulwant Singh, Janta Land Promoters (JLPL) was the first private developer to be granted a license to develop a super-mega project in Punjab. From modest colonisation beginnings, they scaled into a master-developer status, responsible for entire sector layouts and industrial infrastructure across Mohali.
background.c2: JLPL's Mohali presence is concentrated in IT City, Sector 66A — one of the city's most strategically located zones, sitting between the international airport, the IT park, and Phase 8 Industrial Area. Their Falcon View development, spread across 28.5 acres, is the largest private luxury residential campus in Mohali. Their affordable offering — Galaxy Heights — occupies the same sector at roughly one-fifth the price, making JLPL the only Mohali developer currently serving both the ₹95 lakh and ₹9 crore buyer from a single location.

editorialNotes.jlpl-sky-garden: A well-conceived mid-budget residential offering in Sector 66A. While units are compact compared to Falcon View, it provides access to the same high-demand IT City infrastructure. Recommended for rental yields.
editorialNotes.jlpl-falcon-view-sector-66a-mohali: Mohali's definitive legacy luxury address. Falcon View's 28.5-acre campus includes a 5-star club, swimming pool, squash courts, and 24-hour concierge — the only development in the Tricity with this full amenity stack.
editorialNotes.jlpl-galaxy-heights-sector-66a-mohali: JLPL's most accessible offering — compact 2BHK apartments in the same prestigious Sector 66A location as Falcon View, at a fraction of the price. Ideal for first investment or rental yield play near the IT park.

rightFor: End-use buyers wanting a legacy, highly recognized Mohali address
NRI investors seeking liquid, premium-tier assets
Buyers comfortable with ₹4Cr+ ticket sizes for Falcon View
lookElsewhere: First-time buyers with sub-₹1Cr budget (see Jubilee or ICL instead)
Buyers needing immediate possession within 12 months (check current status with our desk)

faqs.q: Is JLPL RERA verified in Mohali?
faqs.a: Yes. All three JLPL projects listed by our desk — Falcon View, Sky Garden, and Galaxy Heights — are registered under Punjab RERA with valid project IDs.

faqs.q: What is the starting price for JLPL flats in Mohali?
faqs.a: ₹95 lakh for Galaxy Heights 2BHK compact units in Sector 66A. Falcon View 3BHK units start at ₹4.09 crore.

faqs.q: In which sectors does JLPL have projects in Mohali?
faqs.a: Sector 66A (primary), with additional industrial-zone presence in Sectors 82 and 83.

faqs.q: Is JLPL a good investment in Mohali?
faqs.a: JLPL Falcon View is the most credentialed luxury address in Mohali and holds its value well. Galaxy Heights offers better yield-per-rupee for investors.

faqs.q: How do I book a JLPL flat through Realty Holding and Management Consultants?
faqs.a: Use the Portfolio Desk Inquiry form on this page or call +91 7814613916. We work directly with JLPL's sales team and can negotiate pricing and payment plans.

ananda-group.buyerProfile: Upper-mid segment buyers seeking luxury amenities near sports hubs
ananda-group.advisoryVerdict: Ananda Group is a growing developer focused on delivering modern high-specification residences in Mohali. Their primary development, Ananda Crown in Sector 78, is designed to cater to modern families prioritizing layout functionality and sports complex proximity. Our advisory desk recommends Ananda for buyers seeking mid-to-high end specifications. Caveat: As a growing developer entity, compare their execution timeline milestones with surrounding private projects before booking.

background.c1: Ananda Group focuses on high-rise residential properties in Mohali's core expansion zones, emphasizing architectural detailing, modern interior fixtures, and client relations.
background.c2: Their presence is highlighted by Ananda Crown in Sector 78. Positioned near Sector 68 and the cricket stadium, this project offers spacious 3BHK and 4BHK apartments with extensive green court views and modern security integrations.

editorialNotes.ananda-crown-mohali-3-4-BHK-flat-sector-: Premium luxury apartments in Sector 78. Features highly spacious 3BHK and 4BHK formats with modern layouts and proximity to sports arenas.

rightFor: Buyers seeking spacious 3BHK/4BHK layouts in Sector 78
Families wanting proximity to schools and sports centers
Buyers seeking modern clubhouse facilities at a competitive rate
lookElsewhere: Buyers looking for entry-level apartments under ₹1 crore
Buyers seeking ready-to-move-in options (under construction phases)

faqs.q: Is Ananda Crown RERA verified?
faqs.a: Yes. Ananda Crown is registered under Punjab RERA (PBRERA-SAS80-PR0832).

faqs.q: What is the price of a flat in Ananda Crown?
faqs.a: Pricing ranges between ₹1.15 crore for 3BHK units and ₹1.95 crore for premium 4BHK configurations.

faqs.q: Where is the Ananda project located?
faqs.a: Ananda Crown is located in Sector 78, Mohali, offering easy access to Sector 68 and Airport Road.

faqs.q: What amenities does Ananda Crown offer?
faqs.a: It includes a luxury clubhouse, swimming pool, indoor sports court, and 24-hour security protocols.

faqs.q: How can I book a unit in Ananda Crown?

bestech-group-bestech-india-pvt-ltd.buyerProfile: Corporate executives, premium families, and commercial real estate investors
bestech-group-bestech-india-pvt-ltd.advisoryVerdict: Bestech Group is a highly credentialed national developer with a major presence in Gurugram and Mohali. Their residential development, Bestech Park View Residences in Sector 66, is highly regarded for its robust construction standards and central location. Our desk recommends Bestech for buyers seeking stable rental demand and corporate-grade maintenance. Caveat: The project is highly populated; check parking slot allocations and tower density levels before buying.

background.c1: Established in 1990 by Dharam Vir Gupta and Hari Singh, Bestech has delivered over 25 million square feet of space. They are known for high-standard design collaborations and building landmark IT complexes.
background.c2: In Mohali, Bestech is a major presence, responsible for Bestech Business Towers in Sector 66. Bestech Park View Residences sits adjacent, creating a high-demand residential pocket for corporate employees and families.

editorialNotes.bestech-park-view-residences-sector-66-m: Established premium residential campus in Sector 66. Outstanding maintenance quality, high rental yields, and immediate proximity to business towers.

rightFor: Corporate professionals working in Sector 66 business towers
Families seeking ready-to-move-in, highly secure premium campuses
Investors looking for highly liquid resale files and high rental yields
lookElsewhere: Buyers seeking low-density, quiet green belts away from commercial centers
Budget-conscious buyers looking for properties under ₹1 crore

faqs.q: Is Bestech Park View RERA verified?
faqs.a: Yes. Bestech Park View Residences is fully registered with Punjab RERA under number PBRERA-SAS81-PR0113.

faqs.q: What is the price of a flat at Bestech Park View Residences?
faqs.a: Pricing ranges between ₹1.10 crore for 2BHK layouts and ₹2.10 crore for premium 4BHK units.

faqs.q: Where is the Bestech project located in Mohali?
faqs.a: It is located in Sector 66, Mohali, adjacent to the Bestech Business Towers and Airport Road.

faqs.q: Is Bestech good for rental income?
faqs.a: Yes. The adjacent business towers generate massive rental demand from senior executives and IT professionals.

faqs.q: How can I inspect Bestech Park View?
faqs.a: Contact our desk to arrange scheduled walkthroughs of verified resale listings in this project.

affinity-buildtech-affinity-group.buyerProfile: Premium families and NRI buyers wanting Aerocity connectivity
affinity-buildtech-affinity-group.advisoryVerdict: Affinity Group is a recognized developer building high-quality residential apartments along Mohali's airport corridor. Our desk recommends Affinity for buyers prioritizing Aerocity location advantages and highway connectivity. Caveat: Proximity to the airport means flight path noise buffers should be evaluated on site with our desk before booking.

background.c2: Their presence is anchored by Affinity Belgravia in Aerocity. The project caters to premium corporate professionals and NRI families seeking direct access to Airport Road, shopping complexes, and international terminals.

editorialNotes.affinity-belgravia-aerocity-mohali: Premium high-rise apartments in Aerocity. Offers exceptional transit connectivity, modern clubhouse facilities, and spacious interior layouts.
